title: Intensely Peppery Tunisian Chicken Kebabs
description: A crowd-pleasing Tunisian dish featuring madras paste, these kebabs are peppery, crisp, and high in protein, perfect for a weeknight dinner. They are made with chicken breast, madras paste, and a blend of spices, then grilled to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
In a bowl, whisk together the madras paste, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, coriander, black pepper, and salt.
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the chicken pieces.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
Let the kebabs rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
